_publications._publicationTitle: Whole exome sequencing reveals the maintained polyclonal nature from primary to metastatic malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor in two patients with NF1.

_contextSnippet: Trim23 knockdown reduced tumor seeding (metastasis) following intraventricular injection, supporting its role in tumor metastasis, rather than primary tumor expansion
details: Trim23 knockdown significantly reduced tumor seeding (metastasis) following intraventricular injection
